# Archetype

Epoca A-type pressure sprayers and foamers are best suited for the professional and trade user. Chemical solutions and applications vary, and Epoca A-type pressure sprayers are available in a variety of seal materials, with pressure spray and foaming nozzles, including bulk sprayers that can be connected to a compressor for constant pressurisation and longer use.

### Handheld Archetype Sprayers:

##### KEY FEATURES

[![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/img-1-scaled.jpg)](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/img-1-scaled.jpg) 

#### A-Type 1.5-litre PRO PA(resistant) VITON Pressure Sprayer

###### EPA15PROPVITON

For the fast, hand-sprayed application of acid-based chemical products and dilutions that require VITON gaskets and seals, as well as a more resistant spray head (for use with hydrocarbon, oit and petroleum-based chemicals)

*We recommend checking suitability with the chemical you wish to use, by referring to the Selection Guide. Incorrect chemical use may corrode the gaskets prematurely.

[View Selection Guide](https://epocasprayers.com.au/guide/)

**Features & Benefits:** 

- Structural parts of the head in resistant nylon (PA)

- Safety valve for automatic depressurization at +- 3 bar; it can be used also manually for releasing the pressure, necessary prior to opening the container 

- Equipped with a protective cap that protects the non return valve from direct liquid contact prolonging its lifetime. 

**Technical Specifications:** 

| Total capacity
| 1860ml

| Operating capacity
| 1500ml

| Gasket
| VITON

| Nozzle
| Adjustable

| Safety valve
| Yes

| Max pressure
| 3.00bar

| Pumping rod
| in PP

![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/AType_ProPAViton-1.jpg)

#### A-Type 1.5-litre VITON
Pressure Sprayer

###### EPA15APVITON

For the fast, hand-sprayed application of acid-based chemical products and dilutions that require VITON gaskets and seals.

*We recommend checking suitability with the chemical you wish to use, by referring to the Selection Guide. Incorrect chemical use may corrode the gaskets prematurely.

[View Selection Guide](https://epocasprayers.com.au/guide/)

**Features & Benefits:** 

- Structural parts of the head in resistant polypropylene (PP)

- Safety valve for automatic depressurization at +- 3 bar; it can be used also manually for releasing the pressure, necessary prior to opening the container 

- Equipped with a protective cap that protects the non return valve from direct liquid contact prolonging its lifetime. 

**Technical Specifications:** 

| Total capacity
| 1860ml

| Operating capacity
| 1500ml

| Gasket
| VITON

| Nozzle
| Adjustable

| Safety valve
| Yes

| Max pressure
| 3.00bar

| Pumping rod
| in PP

![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/image005_98_-removebg-preview-1-1.png)

#### A-Type 1.5-litre EPDM
Pressure Sprayer

###### EPA15PEPDM

For the fast, hand-spayed application of chemical products and dilutions that require EPDM gaskets, such as alkalines and ketones, silicones and alcohol-based chemicals.

*We recommend checking suitability with the chemical you wish to use, by referring to the Selection Guide. Incorrect chemical use may corrode the gaskets prematurely.

[View Selection Guide](https://epocasprayers.com.au/guide/)

**Features & Benefits:**

- Structural parts of the head in resistant polypropylene (PP)

- Safety valve for automatic depressurization at +- 3 bar; it can be used also manually for releasing the pressure, necessary prior to opening the container

- Equipped with a protective cap that protects the non return valve from direct liquid contact prolonging its lifetime.

**Technical Specifications:**

| Total capacity
| 1860ml

| Operating capacity
| 1500ml

| Gasket
| EPDM

| Nozzle
| Adjustable

| Safety valve
| Yes

| Max pressure
| 3.00bar

| Pumping rod
| in PP

![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/image006_69_-removebg-preview-1.png)

#### A-Type 1.5-litre EPDM Pro
Foam Pressure Sprayer

###### EPA15PFOAM

Capable of producing four different levels of foam and designed to satisfy the application of chemicals that require wetter or drier foam types. Each unit is supplied with four felt discs and three additional spacers to suit various types of foam.

For the foaming application of chemical products and dilutions that require EPDM gaskets, such as Alkalines and ketones, detergents, silicones and alcohol-based chemicals.

*We recommend checking suitability with the chemical you wish to use, by referring to the Selection Guide. Incorrect chemical use may corrode the gaskets prematurely.

[View Selection Guide](https://epocasprayers.com.au/guide/)

**Features & Benefits:**

- Structural parts of the head in resistant polypropylene (PP)

- Safety valve for automatic depressurization at +- 3 bar; it can be used also manually for releasing the pressure, necessary prior to opening the container

- Equipped with foam nozzle lance

- Sturdy tank made of chemical-resistant plastic material

- Fan effect nozzle – 110° angle

**Technical Specifications:**

| Total capacity
| 1860ml

| Operating capacity
| 1000ml

| Gasket
| EPDM

| Nozzle
| Fan effect

| Watertight
| No

| Safety valve
| Yes

| Max pressure
| 3.00bar

| Pumping rod
| in PP

![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2022/01/image007_66_-removebg-preview-1-1.png)

#### Service Kits – Handheld Sprayers

Insist on genuine Epoca replacement seals and spare parts for optimum performance and durability.

![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/cards-1.jpg)

**7820** 

Spare parts and accessories for Archetype pressure sprayers 0-2 litres

![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/cards-2.jpg)

**7821**

Spare parts and accessories for foamer sprayers 0-2 litres

### Bulk Archetype Sprayers:

[![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Screenshot_588.png)](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Screenshot_588.png) 

#### A-Type 5-litre Pro VITON

###### EPA5VITON

For bulk and larger spray application of chemical products and dilutions that require VITON gaskets, such as acids, most hydrocarbons and some oil and petroleum chemicals.

Can be manually repressurised or connected to a compressor for constant repressurisation.

*We recommend checking suitability with the chemical you wish to use, by referring to the Selection Guide. Incorrect chemical use may corrode the gaskets prematurely.

[View Selection Guide](https://epocasprayers.com.au/guide/)

**Features & Benefits:**

- 2m hose

- Unidirectional valve to connect air pump fittings

- Pressure gauge

- Protective plastic bar

- Vertical lance holder

- Sturdy tank made of chemical-resistant plastic material

- Padded waterproof straps

- Extra wide stabil base with nozzles & spare parts

- Reclosable storage

- Curved lance with adjustable and fan effect nozzle – 110° angle

**Technical Specifications:**

| Total capacity
| 6500ml

| Operating capacity
| 4875ml

| Gasket
| VITON

| Safety valve
| Yes

| Max pressure
| 3.00bar

![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Group-3.png)

###### EPA5PROFOAMEPDM

Can be manually repressurised or connected to a compressor for constant repressurisation.

** We recommend checking suitability with the chemical you wish to use, by referring to the Selection Guide. Incorrect chemical use may corrode the gaskets prematurely.

- Pressure gauge

- Protective plastic bar

- Vertical lance holder

- Sturdy tank made of chemical-resistant plastic material

- Storage for nozzles & spare parts

- Equipped with curved foam nozzle lance fan effect nozzle – 110° angle

**Technical Specifications:**

| 6500ml

| Operating capacity
| 4875ml

| Gasket
| VITON

| Safety valve
| Yes

| Max pressure
| 3.00bar

![image](https://epocasprayers.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Group-2.png)

#### A-type 10-litre Pro Foam
Pressure Sprayer

###### EPA 10PROFOAMEPDM

For extensive, foaming application, with far fewer stops to refill, of chemical products and dilutions that require EPDM gaskets, such as alkalines and ketones, detergents, silicones and alcohol-based chemicals.

Can be manually repressurised or connected to a compressor for constant repressurisation.

** We recommend checking suitability with the chemical you wish to use, by referring to the Selection Guide. Incorrect chemical use may corrode the gaskets prematurely.

[View Selection Guide](https://epocasprayers.com.au/guide/)

**Features & Benefits:**

- 2m hose

- Unidirectional valve to connect air pump fittings

- Pressure gauge

- Protective plastic bar

- Vertical lance holder

- Sturdy tank made of chemical-resistant plastic material

- Padded waterproof straps

- Storage for nozzles & spare parts

- Equipped with curved foam nozzle lance fan effect nozzle – 110° angle

**Technical Specifications:**

| No
